'''zhojazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ataunto|ataunto]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ataunto|ataunto]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhojazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhojazithi|zhojazithi]] || [[word:zhojaziji|zhojaziji]] || [[word:zhojazishi|zhojazishi]] || [[word:zhojaziki|zhojaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhojazuthuthu|zhojazuthuthu]] || [[word:zhojazujuju|zhojazujuju]] || [[word:zhojazushushu|zhojazushushu]] || [[word:zhojazukuku|zhojazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhojazuthu|zhojazuthu]] || [[word:zhojazuju|zhojazuju]] || [[word:zhojazushu|zhojazushu]] || [[word:zhojazuku|zhojazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhojazufthuf|zhojazufthuf]] || [[word:zhojazufjuf|zhojazufjuf]] || [[word:zhojazufshuf|zhojazufshuf]] || [[word:zhojazufkuf|zhojazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhojazethe|zhojazethe]] || [[word:zhojazeje|zhojazeje]] || [[word:zhojazeshe|zhojazeshe]] || [[word:zhojazeke|zhojazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhojazothotho|zhojazothotho]] || [[word:zhojazojojo|zhojazojojo]] || [[word:zhojazoshosho|zhojazoshosho]] || [[word:zhojazokoko|zhojazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhojazotho|zhojazotho]] || [[word:zhojazojo|zhojazojo]] || [[word:zhojazosho|zhojazosho]] || [[word:zhojazoko|zhojazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhojazofthof|zhojazofthof]] || [[word:zhojazofjof|zhojazofjof]] || [[word:zhojazofshof|zhojazofshof]] || [[word:zhojazofkof|zhojazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfthĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfjĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfshĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfkĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfthĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfjĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfshĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfkĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfthĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfjĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfshĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhojazĂŻfkĂŻf|zhojazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhojazĂŠthĂŠ|zhojazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhojazĂŠjĂŠ|zhojazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhojazĂŠshĂŠ|zhojazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhojazĂŠkĂŠ|zhojazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhojazathatha|zhojazathatha]] || [[word:zhojazajaja|zhojazajaja]] || [[word:zhojazashasha|zhojazashasha]] || [[word:zhojazakaka|zhojazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhojazatha|zhojazatha]] || [[word:zhojazaja|zhojazaja]] || [[word:zhojazasha|zhojazasha]] || [[word:zhojazaka|zhojazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhojazafthaf|zhojazafthaf]] || [[word:zhojazafjaf|zhojazafjaf]] || [[word:zhojazafshaf|zhojazafshaf]] || [[word:zhojazafkaf|zhojazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhojazasha|zhojazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhojazshĂ«asha|zhojazshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhojazroasha|zhojazroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhojazmuasha|zhojazmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhojazyaasha|zhojazyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhojaznkshĂ«asha|gozhojaznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhojaznkroasha|gozhojaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhojaznkmuasha|gozhojaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhojaznkyaasha|gozhojaznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhojajazasha|zhojajazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhojajazshĂ«asha|zhojajazshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhojajazroasha|zhojajazroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhojajazmuasha|zhojajazmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhojajazyaasha|zhojajazyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhojajaznkshĂ«asha|gozhojajaznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhojajaznkroasha|gozhojajaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhojajaznkmuasha|gozhojajaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhojajaznkyaasha|gozhojajaznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhejĂŠzasha|zhejĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhejĂŠzshĂ«asha|zhejĂŠzshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhejĂŠzroasha|zhejĂŠzroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhejĂŠzmuasha|zhejĂŠzmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhejĂŠzyaasha|zhejĂŠzyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhejĂŠznkshĂ«asha|gozhejĂŠznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhejĂŠznkroasha|gozhejĂŠznkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhejĂŠznkmuasha|gozhejĂŠznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhejĂŠznkyaasha|gozhejĂŠznkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhojfazasha|zhojfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhojfazshĂ«asha|zhojfazshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhojfazroasha|zhojfazroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhojfazmuasha|zhojfazmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhojfazyaasha|zhojfazyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhojfaznkshĂ«asha|gozhojfaznkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhojfaznkroasha|gozhojfaznkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhojfaznkmuasha|gozhojfaznkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhojfaznkyaasha|gozhojfaznkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
